memberdef.name: DISPATCH
memberdef.initializer: case NQ: \ kernel_accumulate_block_loop<NQ, ResultHandler>( \ ntotal2, nsq, codes, LUT, res, scaler, block_stride); \ return

memberdef.name: DISPATCH
memberdef.initializer: case QBS: \ accumulate_q_4step<QBS>( \ ntotal2, nsq, codes, LUT0, res, scaler, block_stride); \ return;

memberdef.name: DISPATCH
memberdef.initializer: case NQ: \ kernel_accumulate_block<NQ, ResultHandler>( \ nsq, codes, LUT, res, scaler); \ break
